description: Bright Data provides web data collection infrastructure including proxy networks, scraping and browser APIs, search/SERP tools, hosted scrapers, datasets, and AI-focused web access products. Its platform is used to access public web content, automate extraction, and deliver structured web data at scale.
summary: Bright Data exposes a bearer-authenticated HTTP API at https://api.brightdata.com, a hosted MCP server at mcp.brightdata.com, and an npm-distributed `brightdata` CLI; it also documents native proxy username/password credentials for proxy protocol access.
